Eid Celebration Ceremony Brought All Our Members Together

16.06.2024

Our academic and administrative staff met at the Eid ceremony before Eid al-Adha.

The traditional Ibn Haldun University Eid Celebration Ceremony was held on Thursday, June 13th at the Media and Events Center Event Hall.

Our Secretary General Sebahattin Belik and Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan delivered congratulatory speeches and the ceremony ended with Eid al-Adha greetings and the distribution of Eid al-Adha gifts to our academic and administrative staff.
